title: After Enies Lobby: Key Exchange
description: In the Post-Enies Lobby storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #12, Whitebeard, Franky, Unknown person #33 as the scene develops across pages 15–18.
scene: This scene advances the Post-Enies Lobby conflict through Unknown person #5, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #12, Whitebeard, Franky, focusing on the immediate stakes of after enies lobby: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Oh no, thank you so much!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: I examined the frankly family's injuries.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Fufu, I won't go anywhere anymore.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Look, guys!! My Mikan trees are safe.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Our money and belong-ings are safe, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We can continue our adven- Tures!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: People still went back to the tree

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I've always wanted to have them,

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: to the person I look up to...

summary: This scene advances the Post-Enies Lobby conflict through Unknown person #5, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #12, Whitebeard, Franky, focusing on the immediate stakes of after enies lobby: key exchange.
